description: Join the Binance team for a live AMA discussing Blockstack and its Stacks 2.0 mainnet launch. Learn about the integration of apps and smart contracts with Bitcoin, and participate in giveaways totaling $2,500 in Stacks tokens.
topic_summary: The session covers the Stacks 2.0 mainnet launch, its implications for Bitcoin, and features a Q&A segment with audience participation. Participants can win Stacks tokens through various engagement methods, including questions and social media interactions. [t=40:75] [t=53:26] [t=132:66]
